feature/issue-84-sync-baseline-requireme.task_description: Sync baseline requirements and audit solver-generated formal models and test stubs
feature/issue-84-sync-baseline-requireme.approach: Run sync-baseline-requirements.cjs to populate requirements.json, then review the 6 auto-generated formal models and f_to_t test stubs for semantic correctness and delete or revise hollow scaffolding.
out_of_scope: Implementing new features or functionality in formal models
Executing or validating formal model correctness through model checkers
Writing comprehensive test cases or test data
Refactoring the sync script or its underlying dependencies
Modifying the baseline requirements schema or structure itself
feature/issue-84-sync-baseline-requireme.risk_reason: Task modifies formal model files (.tla, .als), requirements.json, and multiple test stubs across the codebase, with potential deletions and semantic validation changes.
